verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord I must be yours alone Teach me I am not my own Crush and mold this heart of stone In your image make it

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Willful, stubborn, Lord, it's true I do what I want to do Let me learn to follow you Take my will and break it

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: From myself I would be free Take all my identity Fill with your humility Seize my pride and shake it

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When a helpless wreck I am Take me and rebuild the sham To be like the living lamb My life on him I stake it
